_publications._publicationTitle: Multiplatform molecular profiling uncovers two subgroups of malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumors with distinct therapeutic vulnerabilities.

_contextSnippet: In 75% of mice HSC1λ-gPTCH1 formed tumors in the flank, compared to 0% of mice injected with control parental HSC1λ-gGFP cells...PTCH1-knockout resulted in statistically significant increase in cellular proliferation, anchorage independent growth and migration
details: PTCH1-knockout HSC1λ cells formed tumors in 75% of mice compared to 0% with control cells, and showed statistically significant increases in cellular proliferation, anchorage independent growth and migration
